name: Jaromír Lipský
alt_names: ヤロミール・リプスキー
description: Lispky appears in episode 56.  He lives in Czechoslovakia and is a puppeteer, although nobody watches his performance. To earn money, he works in a restaurant to clean dishes in the evening.      ~! When Anna collapses at the Mansion of Red Roses, he finds her and takes her and Dieter at his place. He cares for her for three months and after having made a puppet that looks like Anna, she and Dieter leaves to continue their journey.   Lipsky is the son of Franz Bonaparta. He was a student at the Mansion of Red Roses where his father would give children reading sessions Roses, but Lipsky was considered as useless. !~
